hyp_93fdd92355.statement: Coordinated differential expression in stress-response and cell-cycle gene sets distinguishes treatment from control.
hyp_93fdd92355.rationale: Data summary shows separation on PC1 with enrichment of annotated gene sets related to these processes.
hyp_93fdd92355.testable_prediction: Gene set enrichment on ranked differential expression yields q<0.05 for at least one a priori pathway.

hyp_bc15284a89.statement: A subset of genes with high variance drives batch-like structure confounding group comparisons.
hyp_bc15284a89.rationale: High fraction of variance on early PCs may reflect technical or biological heterogeneity worth testing before causal claims.
hyp_bc15284a89.testable_prediction: Association of top variable genes with batch covariates is stronger than with treatment label.
